pain_point_label: Decentralized Cash Advances & Petty Cash Control

matches.match_rationale: Undetected leakage and fraud in distributed cash flows is exactly what anomaly detection is built for.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A transaction-level anomaly scoring system across all sites surfacing high-risk entries before month-end close.

matches.match_rationale: The approval bottleneck is a multi-step workflow problem with clear branching logic.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A purchase request automation agent handling intake, policy rules, auto-approval within threshold, and audit trail generation.

matches.match_rationale: Physical receipts and handwritten vouchers are the primary documentation in emerging markets. OCR converts these into structured records.
matches.opportunity_sketch: Campus staff photograph receipts; OCR extracts vendor, amount, date, and category, auto-populating the reconciliation ledger.

matches.match_rationale: A model can assess each cash advance cycle compliance risk based on documentation completeness and reconciliation timeliness.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A monthly risk dashboard scoring each site petty cash cycle on compliance indicators.
